headline: Critical drowsiness risk requires immediate action
short_summary: 2,939 events detected, 87.7% high severity, only 0.2% reviewed.

primary_finding.title: Peak risk day
primary_finding.description: Monday has the highest concentration with 1,039 events, representing 35.4% of total events.

main_contributor.description: User #1 is the largest contributor on Monday.

dominant_behavior.label: Drowsiness
dominant_behavior.description: Drowsiness is the dominant behavior on the peak risk day.

review_backlog.description: Review backlog is critical. Most events are still unreviewed.

recommended_actions.title: Investigate User #1
recommended_actions.description: User #1 contributes 73.7% of Monday events and should be reviewed first.

recommended_actions.title: Evaluate Monday operation pattern
recommended_actions.description: Monday has the highest event concentration and may require shift or route evaluation.

flags.label: A single weekday dominates event concentration
A single driver dominates the peak-day contribution
